query:
-- จำลอง debtDb.ts: หา latestCreatedDate + latestUpdatedBy จาก row ที่ created_at สูงสุด
-- แล้ว SUM ทุก real payment ที่ created_date + updated_by เดียวกัน (ระดับ 2)
-- เปรียบเทียบกับ contracts.bad_debt_amount

WITH latest_row AS (
  SELECT 
    pt.contract_external_id,
    DATE(MAX(pt.created_at)) as latest_created_date,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(pt.updated_by ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC), ',', 1) as latest_updated_by
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
  GROUP BY pt.contract_external_id
),
debtdb_sum AS (
  SELECT 
    pt.contract_external_id,
    SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as debtdb_bad_debt
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  INNER JOIN latest_row lr ON lr.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
    AND DATE(pt.created_at) = lr.latest_created_date
    AND pt.updated_by = lr.latest_updated_by
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
  GROUP BY pt.contract_external_id
)
SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as contracts_bad_debt,
  CAST(ds.debtdb_bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as debtdb_bad_debt,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as diff
FROM contracts c
LEFT JOIN debtdb_sum ds ON ds.contract_external_id = c.external_id
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
  AND ABS(COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - c.bad_debt_amount) > 1
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - c.bad_debt_amount) DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
-- จำลอง debtDb.ts: หา latestCreatedDate + latestUpdatedBy จาก row ที่ created_at สูงสุด
-- แล้ว SUM ทุก real payment ที่ created_date + updated_by เดียวกัน (ระดับ 2)
-- เปรียบเทียบกับ contracts.bad_debt_amount

WITH latest_row AS (
  SELECT 
    pt.contract_external_id,
    DATE(MAX(pt.created_at)) as latest_created_date,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(pt.updated_by ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC), ',', 1) as latest_updated_by
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
  GROUP BY pt.contract_external_id
),
debtdb_sum AS (
  SELECT 
    pt.contract_external_id,
    SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as debtdb_bad_debt
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  INNER JOIN latest_row lr ON lr.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
    AND DATE(pt.created_at) = lr.latest_created_date
    AND pt.updated_by = lr.latest_updated_by
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
  GROUP BY pt.contract_external_id
)
SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as contracts_bad_debt,
  CAST(ds.debtdb_bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as debtdb_bad_debt,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount - COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as diff
FROM contracts c
LEFT JOIN debtdb_sum ds ON ds.contract_external_id = c.external_id
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
  AND ABS(COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - c.bad_debt_amount) > 1
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(ds.debtdb_bad_debt, 0) - c.bad_debt_amount) DESC
LIMIT 15;
